query:
-- إنشاء مستخدم omar
INSERT INTO users (username, password_hash, full_name, loginMethod, is_active, role)
VALUES ('omar', '$2b$10$R.45dJeiLLDCqe3xQO.kyeLpNB0z4/ZfZ.Kcl14BEbZMoBK23iVia', 'Omar - Administrator', 'local', 1, 'admin')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
  password_hash = '$2b$10$R.45dJeiLLDCqe3xQO.kyeLpNB0z4/ZfZ.Kcl14BEbZMoBK23iVia',
  full_name = 'Omar - Administrator',
  loginMethod = 'local',
  is_active = 1,
  role = 'admin';

-- منح جميع الصلاحيات لـ omar
SET @omar_id = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE username = 'omar');

DELETE FROM user_permissions WHERE user_id = @omar_id;

INSERT INTO user_permissions (user_id, permission_id, granted)
SELECT @omar_id, id, 1 FROM permissions;
